option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/cream">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:background="@color/deepBlue" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnClose" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Close" android:backgroundTint="@color/cream" android:textColor="@color/cream" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Todo List" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/cream" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnAddTodo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Add" android:backgroundTint="@color/deepGreen" android:textColor="@color/cream" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Todos RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvTodos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_margin="16dp" app:layoutManager="androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/cream">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp" android:background="@color/deepBlue" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnClose" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Close" android:backgroundTint="@color/cream" android:textColor="@color/cream" />
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Todo List" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/cream" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnAddTodo" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Add" android:backgroundTint="@color/deepGreen" android:textColor="@color/cream" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Todos RecyclerView --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvTodos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_margin="16dp" app:layoutManager="androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginVertical="4dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" android:background="@color/deepBlue" >
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_green_stroke" >
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginRight="6dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Students Management Web" android:textSize="25dp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/deepGreen" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginBottom="18dp" >
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Your task - " android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView3" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Task 02" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/button" android:layout_width="110dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="View Task" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginRight="3dp" style="@android:style/Widget.Button" android:background="@drawable/bg_deep_green" />
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/button2" android:layout_width="110dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginLeft="3dp" android:textStyle="bold" style="@android:style/Widget.Button" android:background="@drawable/bg_deep_green" android:text="Chat" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.PieChart android:id="@+id/pieChart" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvProjectName" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginVertical="4dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" android:background="@color/deepBlue" >
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_green_stroke" >
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginRight="6dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Students Management Web" android:textSize="25dp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/deepGreen" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginBottom="18dp" >
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Your task - " android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp"/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView3" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Task 02" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/button" android:layout_width="110dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="View Task" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginRight="3dp" style="@android:style/Widget.Button" android:background="@drawable/bg_deep_green" />
<androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/button2" android:layout_width="110dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginLeft="3dp" android:textStyle="bold" style="@android:style/Widget.Button" android:background="@drawable/bg_deep_green" android:text="Chat" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.PieChart android:id="@+id/pieChart" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/textView" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
